## Credo Technology's Russell 1000 inclusion prompts re-examination of AI connectivity investment thesis

Russell 1000 inclusion is a structural passive-demand catalyst and a credibility signal for CRDO; for a PM already holding the name, expanded institutional eligibility supports position liquidity, and renewed coverage attention may drive incremental buy-side engagement with the AI connectivity thesis.

- CRDO has been added to the Russell 1000 index
- Index inclusion expands institutional investor eligibility and passive demand for the stock
- Coverage uses the event as an occasion to revisit CRDO's AI connectivity positioning
- Headline poses the thesis question as open rather than resolved — no verdict on valuation given
- High-confidence classifier tag on networking and AI compute topology angles
